title: (Bullish Signal) KNSL enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Mar 11, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that KNSL's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 73 similar cases where KNSL's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 63 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 86%. Current price $176.61 crossed the resistance line at $168.92 and is trading between $187.44 support and $168.92 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/08/21 - 03/11/21, the price experienced a -6% Downtrend, while the week of 03/04/21 - 03/11/21 shows a +12% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/vq8a46nilmm61.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=f485b76503b3e27f560a4205720eec6aa5f2b2eb

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 31 of 39 cases where KNSL's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 11, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on KNSL as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 63 of 73 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trezd are 86%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for KNSL just turned positive on March 11, 2021. Looking at past instances where KNSL's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 33 of 44 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

Following a +4.35% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where KNSL advanced for three days, in 288 of 353 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

KNSL may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
